## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] chore

## Validation

- [ ] I ran relevant scripts locally.
- [ ] I ran `./scripts/healthcheck.sh` if behavior changed.
- [ ] I updated docs for behavior changes.

## Risk and Rollback

- Risk level: low / medium / high
- Rollback plan:

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets added.
- [ ] Scripts are executable where required.
- [ ] Changelog updated (if user-visible change).
